criteria.label: Correctly split fit_transform (train) vs transform (test) for a text vectorizer.
criteria.example: Given two lists train_texts and test_texts, write vec.fit_transform(train_texts) and vec.transform(test_texts), then print shapes and assert test columns match vec.get_feature_names_out().

criteria.label: Build a sklearn Pipeline with a vectorizer and linear classifier.
criteria.example: Create Pipeline([('tfidf', TfidfVectorizer(max_features=5000)), ('clf', LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000))]), fit on labeled strings, predict one new sentence.

criteria.label: Choose CountVectorizer vs TfidfVectorizer vs HashingVectorizer for a stated scenario.
criteria.example: For 50 labeled SMS messages justify CountVectorizer; for 10M log lines/day justify HashingVectorizer with n_features=2**18.

criteria.label: Explain why refitting a vectorizer on production batches breaks serving.
criteria.example: Describe how a new batch introducing token "refund" shifts column indices so LogisticRegression.coef_ no longer aligns with the live feature matrix.

criteria.label: Inspect and interpret top features after extraction.
criteria.example: After fitting TfidfVectorizer, list the five feature names with highest mean tf-idf weight across training rows using get_feature_names_out().
